main-title: HODL Waves: A revolutionary way to identify Bitcoin trends
main-text:
A cryptocurrency-based financial firm “Unchained Capital” has recently released a sensational research study called ‘Bitcoin Data Science: Hodl Waves’. Using the UTXO (Unspent Transaction Output) functionality of the Bitcoin blockchain, the research team was able to analyze and predict major BTC price patterns.

Read all about the methodology behind this research and how it can be used in your trading in our latest blog entry.
text-1: Following the testimony of Mark Zuckerberg, Facebook shares have appreciated 5%. One FB stock is now worth $166. Despite accusations, Facebook is still doing good.
text-2: A small island nation is becoming an important crypto hub. Following the example of Binance, Hong Kong-based OKEx decided to relocate.
